text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide is reading a fan letter one day in
my office and smiles to herself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
"The way your intellect shines in your eyes
through your glasses is wonderful!"

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It feels strange to be praised for my glasses. After
all, I only wear them for the sake of correcting my
weak vision.
choice_data_list: Still, your fans find them appealing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I can use how others see me to create a
more favorable image of myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
These fan letters provide great insight into how
others regard me and what they expect from me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
As someone who's constantly in the public eye, I
must do my best to retain my fans' support.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to take greater care in how I present
myself and refine the attributes that set me apart
from others.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
First and foremost, I'll start with the way I clean
my glasses.

I can't help but notice the sense of pride that
emanates from her as she adjusts her glasses.
